setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added basic test coverage for UnitTest1 class with a simple pass-through test method
recommendations: Add more specific test scenarios
Implement detailed test logic based on method implementation
Consider adding parameterized tests if method accepts parameters
keyImprovements: Created test class following naming conventions
Added FluentAssertions for more robust testing
fileReports.note: Current test is a placeholder due to minimal method implementation

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling in writeMessage method
Implement logging instead of Console.WriteLine for better traceability
Add configuration options for producer timeout and retry policies
keyImprovements: Tested message production with valid and invalid inputs
Verified dispose and error handling behavior
fileReports.note: Tests use localhost:9092 as bootstrap servers - replace with actual Kafka configuration in real-world scenarios

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for Startup class covering configuration, service registration, and environment-specific configurations
recommendations: Add more granular configuration testing
Consider integration tests for full pipeline verification
Add more edge case scenarios for configuration binding
fileReports.note: Requires Moq and FluentAssertions for mocking and assertions

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading scenarios, and disposal behavior
recommendations: Consider adding more detailed error logging in readMessage method
Implement more granular exception handling
Add cancellation token support for long-running message consumption
fileReports.note: Tests use Moq for mocking and FluentAssertions for assertions. Requires Confluent.Kafka package for ConsumerConfig

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive tests for Program.cs top-level program initialization, covering host builder configuration, startup usage, and default settings
recommendations: Add more detailed configuration testing
Consider integration tests for full application startup
Add logging and dependency injection verification
keyImprovements: Handled null and empty argument scenarios
fileReports.note: Tests focus on program initialization and basic configuration verification

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering all properties, constructors, and enum values with 100% code coverage
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for productname and quantity
Implement custom validation logic for quantity constraints
Add XML documentation comments to clarify property meanings
keyImprovements: Full coverage of OrderRequest model properties
Verified default and custom initialization scenarios
Tested edge cases like null and zero values
fileReports.note: Tests assume no additional validation logic exists in the current model

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController with 8 test cases covering various scenarios including valid requests, invalid model state, serialization, constructor initialization, and error handling
recommendations: Add more specific validation for OrderRequest model
Consider adding logging for better traceability
Implement more robust error handling in ProducerWrapper
keyImprovements: Tested both successful and failure scenarios
fileReports.note: Tests assume existence of OrderRequest model and ProducerWrapper class. Actual implementation may require adjustments based on exact class definitions.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProcessOrdersService with 5 test methods covering constructor initialization, order processing scenarios, error handling, and multiple product type processing
recommendations: Add more robust error handling in the service
Consider adding logging for better traceability
Implement more granular exception handling for different scenarios
keyImprovements: Covered null and invalid input scenarios
fileReports.note: Tests use mocking to simulate Kafka consumer and producer interactions without actual network calls
